title: Arkanis
description: Modpack inspirado na série multiplayer Arkanis (feito por fã).  Fan-made modpack inspired by the Arkanis multiplayer series.
body:
### Modpack inspirado na série multiplayer Arkanis.

Neste modpack contém Mods da Série Arkanis, como:

- Biomes O' Plenty [https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- Create [https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- Alex Mobs [https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- e muito mais!

# Arkanis é um servidor de Minecraft RP com vários streamers brasileiros.
Para mais informações acesse [Site Oficial da série Arkanis ](https://arkanis.com.br/)


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fan-made modpack inspired by the Arkanis multiplayer series.

This modpack contains mods from the Arkanis series!

You will find mods such as:

- Biomes O' Plenty [https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- Create [https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- Alex Mobs [https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- and more!
